nodes.summary: GitHub profile README for Abdul Basit. Describes his role as a Backend Engineer and AI Systems Builder at VillaEx Technologies. Lists featured projects (ai-dev-team autonomous agent, quran_app, ashi AI OS) and full technology stack (FastAPI, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, LiveKit, Kotlin, Rust, TypeScript).

steps.reason: This is the only file in the repo — it is Abdul Basit's public GitHub profile README summarising his work and stack.
